title: vicia alpestris
intro: Vicia alpestris, also known as alpine vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent qualities, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Vicia alpestris include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Vicia alpestris is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in the form of salves and creams to treat topical skin conditions.
